scene_title: Multidão P&B com figura iluminada no centro
narrative_beat: Wide overhead of P&B silhouetted crowd walking in parallel lines on white marble, single figure at center in ochre robes under golden spotlight

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a vast marble plaza seen from above with hundreds of silhouetted human figures walking in rigid parallel lines
subject.focal_point: a single figure at center in vivid ochre and crimson robes looking upward in despair, lit by a vertical golden spotlight
subject.secondary: Crowd entirely desaturated. Central figure in vivid color. Ash particles floating.

composition.foreground: central figure in rich ochre and crimson

lighting.key_light: vertical golden spotlight from above on central figure

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.primary: permanent potential criminality under arbitrary law

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
